title: cyclosorus subpubescens
intro: Cyclosorus subpubescens, also known as the Dwarf Lady fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cyclosorus subpubescens include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to improve cardiovascular health and boost the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's fronds are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
